title: Vo Dasha

'''Vo Dasha''' was the only [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Taboon]], located in the [[Aweris system]] of the [[Stenness Node]] region. A barren locale consisting of mountains, canyons, and rocky plains, Vo Dasha's Type II [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] forced visitors to the moon's surface to wear [[Breath mask/Legends|breath masks]]. By [[3999 BBY]], Vo Dasha and the surrounding area had fallen under the influence of Stenness Node-based [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], who placed his [[Bogga's palace|estate]] and base of operations on Vo Dasha.

The moon subsequently became the center of [[Bogga's criminal empire]], the crime lord's home, and the docking place of Bogga's [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], including the massive [[Dreadnaught/Legends|dreadnaught]] [[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']]. In 3999 BBY, the ''Enforcer One'' brought a [[Prisoner/Legends|captured]] [[Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang|gang]] of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], led by [[Finhead Stonebone]], to Vo Dasha to meet with Bogga the Hutt, who sent the pirates on a [[Skirmish on Ambria|mission]] to [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]].

==Description==
Vo Dasha was the only [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]<ref name="atlas" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taboon]], located in the [[Aweris system]]<ref name="companion" /> of the [[Airon sector/Legends|Airon sector]]<ref name="atlascompanion" /> in the [[Stenness Node]].<ref name="nomi2" /> Vo Dasha had a barren landscape, dominated by mountains, canyons, and rocky plains, and its Type II [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] forced visitors to wear [[Breath mask/Legends|breath masks]] while on the moon's surface. The climate of the moon was hot and arid, and Vo Dasha had only light [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]. The length of a day on Vo Dasha was twelve [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]], and a year was one hundred sixty-seven local days.<ref name="companion" /> One of Vo Dasha's native [[Species/Legends|species]] was a variety of [[Pterosaur|two-headed, airborne]] [[Reptavian/Legends|reptavian]]. The moon also was the home to various immigrated species, including [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], [[Human/Legends|Humans]], and [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]].<ref name="nomi2" />

==History==
The collapse of a giant molecular cloud resulted in the creation of the yellow [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Awer]] and its single [[Satellite/Legends|satellite]], Taboon, and the planet eventually took Vo Dasha as its moon.<ref name="companion" /> By [[3999 BBY]], Vo Dasha had become part of the [[Bogga's criminal empire|criminal empire]] of local [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], who placed his [[Bogga's palace|estate]] and base of operations on the moon. Vo Dasha subsequently became the docking place of Bogga's [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], including the massive [[Dreadnaught/Legends|dreadnaught]] [[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']]. In 3999 BBY, the ''Enforcer One'' returned to Vo Dasha from a mission carrying a load of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] that had been taken [[Prisoner/Legends|captive]] while attempting to [[Attack on the Ithullan ore hauler|raid]] an [[Ithullan ore hauler]] in the Stenness Node. The [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Grimorg]], one of Bogga's top [[Bogga's enforcer gang|enforcers]], brought the pirate [[Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang|gang]] to Vo Dasha, where Bogga offered the pirate leader, [[Finhead Stonebone]], freedom in exchange for a favor; journeying to the desolate planet [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]] and retrieving a lost shipment of [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]] from Bogga's sworn enemy, a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] named [[Thon]].<ref name="nomi2" /> Stonebone took the deal, and he and his gang departed Vo Dasha in their [[Starship/Legends|ships]], the ''[[Marauder Starjacker]]'' and the ''[[Stenness Raider]]''.<ref name="nomi3">[[Tales of the Jedi 5|''Tales of the Jedi'' 5]]</ref>

==Inhabitants==
Initially about two-hundred fifty [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings inhabited Vo Dasha, but the population grown a lot in the future years. All of them were affiliated with Bogga's criminal empire. The residents of Vo Dasha were mainly confined to Bogga's estate.<ref name="companion" /> These individuals included Bogga himself, Grimorg, and many of the Hutt crime lord's [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]].<ref name="nomi2" />

==Locations==
Vo Dasha's main landmark was the estate of Stenness Node-based crime lord Bogga the Hutt.<ref name="nomi2" /> Bogga's estate was hermetically sealed due to Vo Dasha's harsh atmosphere, and was located atop one of the moon's most prominent peaks. The Hutt crime lord used this fortress as the base of operations for all his illegal activities. Bogga's estate included meeting chambers, storage areas, [[Hangar/Legends|docking]] and maintenance bays, weapons lockers, living quarters, a relatively large dungeon complex, and a throne room/audience chamber.<ref name="companion" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vo Dasha first appeared in ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Saga of Nomi Sunrider|Tales of the Jedi: The Saga of Nomi Sunrider]]'', the second story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by [[Tom Veitch]] and released over late [[1993]]-early [[1994]]. The moon first appeared in the arc's [[Tales of the Jedi 4|second issue]],<ref name="nomi2" /> and later reappeared in the arc's [[Tales of the Jedi 5|third and final issue]].<ref name="nomi3" /> In these appearances, Vo Dasha was illustrated by [[David Roach]].<ref name="nomi2" /><ref name="nomi3" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] {{1st}}
*[[Tales of the Jedi 5|''Tales of the Jedi'' 5]]
